titleStmt.title: SII 23.313: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 313. (A.R. No. 313 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same gōpura, left of entrance Vikrama-Pāṇḍya: year 3: 1285-86 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with the Sanskrit introduction Samasta-bhuvanaikavīra etc. of Māṟavarman Vikrama-Pāṇḍya whose date of accession was 1283 A.D. It is dated in the 226th day of his 3rd regnal year. In this panegyric Vikrama claims to have been a friend of the Kerala, and a foe of the Chōḷa, Laṅka kings, an overlord of chiefs Kshēmēsvara, Nārasimha-Kāṭaka Vīra Gaṇḍagōpāla and the Kākatiya Gaṇapati and to have crowned himself at Kāñchīpura. The inscription is damaged after the 8th line, and seems to register a gift of 30 vēli of land as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili for the expenses of worship and offerings to the deity during the daily service in the temple instituted in the name of the king, and on some special festival days every month. The lands are stated to be situated at Tirumaṅgalam and other villages.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanaikavīra dvandrakulamaṅgalapradīpa madhurāpurimahendra keraḷa
kālāndhakāradivākara coḷavamśa vārirāśibāḍabā nala laṅkāpurikāḷakū
ṭa kadanakāḷakaṇṭhaº karṇṇāṭakarikaḷabhakaṇṭhirava kṣemāsuravidāraṇa narasiṅha kāṅka
vamśavaiśvā ṅgalapurādhiśvara vira gaṇḍagopāla
garāja kāñcīpura[viracita]rājyābhiṣeka gaṇapatigandhagajakūṭapākala
vairidurggabhañjana praṇatarājasthāpa nācārya tribhuvanarājādhirāja para
meśvara śrīvikramapāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3vatu ḷ 2 100 2 10 6 ṉāl ko
koyil tevārattu vācalil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu tiruvāymoḻin taruḷi Eḻuti
Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil tāṉattāṟku nāyaṉā
kaṭṭiṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ cantikkum tiṅkaḷ tirunāḷukkum Amutu
paṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nitta nimantaṅkaḷukku virutarāca payaṅkaravaḷa
nāṭṭu tirumaṅkalattum piṟinta Ūrkaḷilum pala tevarkaḷ tevatāṉam ni
le tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka muppatiṟṟu veli nilam kaṭamai kuṭi
mai Antarāyam vaṟka vāram māvaṭai
ttuvaṟkamum Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa It
kameṟṟi Uḷḷa nilam Ivvāṇṭumutal
tākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi kallilum
cempilu ḷka yamaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum I�
ttu Eṉṟum miḻalaikkūṟṟattu civu
yāṉ tirumāliruñcolainiṉṟāṉ
rāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum vicaiyaṅkuṭirāyaṉ kūtta
ṉa kurukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Innila muppa
tiṟṟuveliyum pottakam Eṟṟi variyil kaḻit
�ṉpaṟṟi Uṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu Eṉṟum
tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiyāṉ
paṉṟūruṭaiyār tiruvaṭi
Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai paḻuvūruṭaiyāṉ
Digital edition of SII 23.313 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
